title: Scrap Tools
description: Now you can change the aspect of your diamond, netherite or iron tools for a rusty one
body: ![.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a3e3878d475a70f1d19884f774e7f36e4249066a_0.webp) This texture packs add a new rusty looks for the diamond, iron and netherite tools Rename items by "Scrap _tool of your preference_" ![.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9b977692dec0a7763a465f176b2b2e61e84d9236_0.webp) Game versions: You can use this texture pack with Vanilla Minecraft or Optifine Cit/ CIT Resew Optifine -> 1.20 - 1.21.4 Vanilla -> 1.21.6 - 26.1 Check my profile for more content ;)
